mapper.sql: id, trace_id, user_id, user_message, matched_resource_id, matched_resource_name, similarity_score, summary, target_platform, push_status, error_message, context, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO message_logs ( trace_id, user_id, user_message, matched_resource_id, matched_resource_name, similarity_score, summary, target_platform, push_status, error_message, context, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{traceId}, #{userId}, #{userMessage}, #{matchedResourceId}, #{matchedResourceName}, #{similarityScore}, #{summary}, #{targetPlatform}, #{pushStatus}, #{errorMessage}, #{context, typeHandler=com.example.handler.JsonTypeHandler}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE message_logs SET push_status = #{pushStatus}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM message_logs WHERE push_status = 2 AND created_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN push_status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as success, SUM(CASE WHEN push_status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as failed, AVG(similarity_score) as avg_similarity FROM message_logs WHERE created_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime}
